title: Welcome to doseo
subtitle: Let's get your SEO monitoring set up in a few quick steps.

welcome.heading: Welcome to doseo!
welcome.description: Your all-in-one SEO monitoring platform. Track keyword positions, analyze competitors, audit your site, and get AI-powered strategy recommendations.

features.positioning: Keyword position tracking with daily updates
features.competitors: Competitor analysis and content gap detection
features.audit: On-site SEO audit with actionable recommendations
features.strategy: AI-powered SEO strategy and calendar planning

orgSetup.heading: Set up your organization
orgSetup.description: Customize your organization name. You can always change this later in settings.

firstDomain.heading: Add your first domain
firstDomain.description: Enter the domain you want to monitor. We'll start tracking its SEO performance right away.
